uploadDescription: Choose a ZIP, TAR, GZ, or TGZ file to inspect without uploading it anywhere.
uploadHint: Click or drag an archive file here
supportedFormats: Supported formats: ZIP, TAR, GZ, TGZ
localOnlyNote: Files stay in this browser session. The archive is not sent to a server.
unsupportedFormat: Unsupported archive format. Use a ZIP, TAR, GZ, TGZ, or TAR.GZ file.
parseFailed: Unable to parse this archive. It may be corrupted, encrypted, or use an unsupported feature.
gzipUnsupported: This browser does not support GZIP decompression.
previewTooLarge: Preview is limited to 1 MB. Download the entry to inspect the full file.
noPreview: Preview is not available for this file type.
noArchiveDescription: Open an archive to browse its folders and preview files.
explorerDescription: Browse the current folder, search visible entries, and select a file to preview it.
emptyFolderDescription: This folder is empty or nothing matches the current search.
previewDescription: Text, image, and PDF entries can be inspected before downloading.
previewPlaceholderDescription: Choose a file entry from the archive explorer to see a preview and download action.
